name: The Winery at Harvest Moon Golf Course
about: The Winery at Harvest Moon Golf Course is a dining and event venue located on 110 acres of a golf course in Defiance County, Ohio. The establishment focuses on providing a scenic location for wine tasting and food service, without any mention of golf simulator technology. Patrons can enjoy indoor and outdoor spaces with a bar, lounge areas, and views of the golf course. The venue offers a full menu including flatbreads, quesadillas, sandwiches, and a selection of wines and cocktails, making it a spot for casual dining and gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Unique blend of golf and wine for a post-game experience
Scenic golf course setting for outdoor relaxation
Onsite dining options for social gatherings after a round

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available including flatbreads, quesadillas, sandwiches, nachos, and desserts. Kids eat free items are offered.
Selection of wines, cocktails, and beer. BYOB not mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf simulator technology is not available at this venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not mentioned as being permitted. The venue offers a full menu of food and alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulators?
faq.answer: This venue does not have golf simulators available.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, offering a kids' eat free program and a variety of menu items.
